name: TestSetEcuOnline
title: TestSetEcuOnline
description: Connects the ECU to the bus.After calling the testSetEcuOffline() function the ECU can be reconnected to the bus by using the testSetEcuOnline() function. Messages being sent by the ECU will be forwarded to the bus.
This function interferes with the CAPL program and possible Nodelayer DLLs.

parameters.name: aNode
parameters.description: ECU to be switched online (must be defined in the database).

parameters.name: aNodeName
parameters.description: Name of the ECU to be switched online (must be defined in the database). Node name can optionally specified by an additional qualifier: NodeName BusName::NodeName

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
